features.name: arithmetic_right_shift_xor_without_parens
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic right shift expression followed by XOR operator where missing parentheses cause incorrect operator precedence

features.name: signed_shift_amount_with_bitwise_op
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic right shift on signed value where the shift amount is a $signed() cast combined with XOR operator

features.name: dynamic_shift_with_tail_slice
features.description: Code should include a dynamic shift operation where the shift amount is derived from a tail/slice operation on a multi-bit signal
